```{r}
library(readr)
```

```{r define highly variable pathways}
up_hv_pseudocount_pathways = read_tsv(here("figures/up_hv_pseudocount_pathways.tsv"))$Description
dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways = read_tsv(here("figures/dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways.tsv"))$Description
```

### Upregulated pathways
```{r}
up_hv_pseudocount_pathways_df = as.data.frame(up_hv_pseudocount_pathways)
```

```{r read in stats results}
up_circulating_lung_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/up_circulating_lung_MW.tsv"))
colnames(up_circulating_lung_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "circulating-lung", colnames(up_circulating_lung_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
up_norm_auroc_df = merge(up_hv_pseudocount_pathways_df, up_circulating_lung_MW[c("GO_term","circulating-lung")], 
      by.x="up_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

up_microarray_rnaseq_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/up_microarray_rnaseq_MW.tsv"))
colnames(up_microarray_rnaseq_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "microarray-rnaseq", colnames(up_microarray_rnaseq_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
up_norm_auroc_df = merge(up_norm_auroc_df, up_microarray_rnaseq_MW[c("GO_term","microarray-rnaseq")], 
      by.x="up_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

up_primary_cellline_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/up_primary_cellline_MW.tsv"))
colnames(up_primary_cellline_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "primary-cellline", colnames(up_primary_cellline_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
up_norm_auroc_df = merge(up_norm_auroc_df, up_primary_cellline_MW[c("GO_term","primary-cellline")], 
      by.x="up_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

up_indiv_aggr_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/up_indiv_aggr_MW.tsv"))
colnames(up_indiv_aggr_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "individual-aggregated", colnames(up_indiv_aggr_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
up_norm_auroc_df = merge(up_norm_auroc_df, up_indiv_aggr_MW[c("GO_term","individual-aggregated")], 
      by.x="up_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)
```

```{r up hv plot}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(matrixStats)
# optional if you want NA-aware distances
# install.packages("proxy")
library(proxy)

# Build matrix and set row names
X <- as.matrix(up_norm_auroc_df[, !(names(up_norm_auroc_df) %in% "up_hv_pseudocount_pathways")])
rownames(X) <- up_norm_auroc_df$up_hv_pseudocount_pathways

# Ensure numeric
storage.mode(X) <- "numeric"

# Clean non-finite values
X[!is.finite(X)] <- NA

# Drop all-NA rows/cols
X <- X[rowSums(is.na(X)) < ncol(X), , drop = FALSE]
X <- X[, colSums(is.na(X)) < nrow(X), drop = FALSE]

# Impute remaining NAs to a neutral value (for normalized AUROC centered at 0)
if (anyNA(X)) X[is.na(X)] <- 0

# Drop zero-variance rows/cols (they break distance/clustering)
rv <- rowVars(X); cv <- colVars(X)
X <- X[rv > 0 & !is.na(rv), , drop = FALSE]
X <- X[, cv > 0 & !is.na(cv), drop = FALSE]

# Color scale: clamp to data range to avoid outlier washout
lims <- range(X, finite = TRUE)
lo <- max(-1, lims[1]); hi <- min(1, lims[2])
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(lo, 0, hi), c("darkblue", "white", "darkred"))

# Optional: NA-aware distances (comment these two lines to use defaults)
dist_rows  <- function(m) proxy::dist(m,      method = "euclidean", na.rm = TRUE)
dist_cols  <- function(m) proxy::dist(t(m),   method = "euclidean", na.rm = TRUE)

# Plot
Heatmap(X, name = "normalized AUROC", col = col_fun,
        na_col = "lightgrey", cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_columns = TRUE)


```

### Downregulated pathways
```{r}
dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways_df = as.data.frame(dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways)
```

```{r read in stats results}
dn_circulating_lung_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/dn_circulating_lung_MW.tsv"))
colnames(dn_circulating_lung_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "circulating-lung", colnames(dn_circulating_lung_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
dn_norm_auroc_df = merge(dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways_df, dn_circulating_lung_MW[c("GO_term","circulating-lung")], 
      by.x="dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

dn_microarray_rnaseq_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/dn_microarray_rnaseq_MW.tsv"))
colnames(dn_microarray_rnaseq_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "microarray-rnaseq", colnames(dn_microarray_rnaseq_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
dn_norm_auroc_df = merge(dn_norm_auroc_df, dn_microarray_rnaseq_MW[c("GO_term","microarray-rnaseq")], 
      by.x="dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

dn_primary_cellline_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/dn_primary_cellline_MW.tsv"))
colnames(dn_primary_cellline_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "primary-cellline", colnames(dn_primary_cellline_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
dn_norm_auroc_df = merge(dn_norm_auroc_df, dn_primary_cellline_MW[c("GO_term","primary-cellline")], 
      by.x="dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)

dn_indiv_aggr_MW = read_tsv(here("figures/dn_indiv_aggr_MW.tsv"))
colnames(dn_indiv_aggr_MW) = gsub("norm_auroc", "individual-aggregated", colnames(dn_indiv_aggr_MW), ignore.case = FALSE, fixed = FALSE)
dn_norm_auroc_df = merge(dn_norm_auroc_df, dn_indiv_aggr_MW[c("GO_term","individual-aggregated")], 
      by.x="dn_hv_pseudocount_pathways", 
      by.y="GO_term", all.x=TRUE)
```
